case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANICISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. KEENA JAMELL MIDDLETON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANICISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MIDDLETON, KEENA JAMELL DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-02-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-27-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-16-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-02-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-20-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
